sourceList.title:
Iveta de Arches
Birth: 1137 Scagglethorpe, Ryedale District, North Yorkshire, England
Death: 1175 (aged 37–38) Skelton, York Unitary Authority, North Yorkshire, England
Burial: Guisborough Priory, Guisborough, Redcar and Cleveland Unitary Authority, North
Iveta de Arches (1137-1175), "Find A Grave Index"
Ivetta d' Arches in Our Royal, Titled, Noble, and Commoner Ancestors

zh.lifeSummary: 當Juetta de Arches於1137年出生在英國越可爾索普 阿其時，她的父親Guillaume d'Arques42歲，母親Yvette de York44歲。她和Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1206年在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素享年69歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime). The name was sometimes reduced to   Arch  .
2 English: variant of Arch with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Arch
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living by a bridge, from Middle English, Old French arche ‘arch’ (i.e. of a bridge).
English (of Norman origin): shortened form of Arches, a habitational name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime).
Germanized form of Slovenian Arh: from a shortened form of the personal name Areh, an old vernacular form of Henrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Juetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Comparatively recent coinage, a Latinate derivative of the vocabulary word denoting the mineral jet. This word is derived from Old French jaiet, from Latin (lapis) gagates ‘stone from Gagai’. The latter was a city in Lycia, Asia Minor.

en.lifeSummary: When Juetta de Arches was born in 1137, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, her father, Guillaume d'Arques, was 42 and her mother, Yvette de York, was 44. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. She died in 1206, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Thorpe in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England: Thorpe in Rothwell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juetta de Arches est née en 1137, à Thorp Arch, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Guillaume d'Arques, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Yvette de York, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. Elle est décédée en 1206, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juetta de Arches 1137 in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume d'Arques 42 und ihre Mutter Yvette de York 44. Sie hatte mit Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1206 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juetta de Arches è nata il nel 1137 nel Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Guillaume d'Arques, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Yvette de York, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. Morì nel 1206, nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Juetta de Archesが1137年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルプ アーチで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Arquesは42歳，母Yvette de Yorkは44歳であった。彼女はAdam de Brus Lord of Skeltonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1206年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで69歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Thorpe in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소 인 로스웰
ko.lifeSummary: Juetta de Arches(이)가 1137년 영국 요르크실르 소 아치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Arques(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yvette de York(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1206년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juetta de Arches nasceu em 1137, em Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Guillaume d'Arques, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Yvette de York, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. Ela faleceu em 1206, em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Thorpe in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England: таурп ин ротвелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juetta de Arches родилась в 1137 г. в местности таурп арч, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Arques было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Yvette de York, 44. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. Она умерла в 1206 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juetta de Arches nació en 1137, en Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Guillaume d'Arques, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Yvette de York, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton. Murió en 1206, en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
